# `library_codex.convolution.PRecursive`

P再帰列の推定・列挙・巨大添字項。

- 計算量の目安: 多項式行列積依存
- source: [`convolution/PRecursive.py`](../../../convolution/PRecursive.py)
- 公開API: function 3、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

```python
from library_codex.convolution.PRecursive import find_p_recursive, enumerate_p_recursive, kth_term_p_recursive
```
